footer.description: A registered non-profit organization dedicated to the welfare of stray cats. We believe every life is precious.

hero.title: Every stray deserves a warm home and a full heart.
hero.description: We are a community of cat lovers dedicated to rescuing, rehabilitating, and rehoming stray cats in our city. Join our mission today.

donate.title: Support our mission
donate.description: Your donations provide food, medicine, and shelter.

volunteer.title: Become a volunteer
volunteer.description: Give your time to help care for our furry friends.

cta.title: Ready to make a difference?
cta.description: Whether you have an hour a week or a spare room in your home, there's a place for you in our community.

about.title: Our mission is simple: every cat deserves love.
about.description: AFFA was founded in 2018 by a group of neighbors who noticed an increasing number of stray cats in their local park. What started as a small feeding program has grown into a city-wide rescue network.

history.title: Where it all began
history.description: Our founder, Elena, rescued her first stray, 'Barnaby,' from a construction site. Seeing how much a little care could transform a scared stray into a loving companion, she knew she had to do more.

compassion.title: Compassion
compassion.desc: We treat every cat with the dignity and love they deserve.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: We are transparent about our operations and use of funds.

community.title: Community
community.desc: We believe in the power of people working together.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We provide the highest standard of medical and emotional care.

join.title: Join our journey
join.description: We're always looking for new partners, volunteers, and foster homes. Together, we can make our city a safer place for every cat.

adopt.title: Find your new best friend
adopt.description: All our cats are vaccinated, microchipped, and looking for a loving home. Browse our current residents below.

cat.description: is a friendly and playful cat who loves attention. She's looking for a home where she can be the center of attention.

process.title: Adoption Process
process.description: Our adoption process includes an application, a home visit, and an adoption fee to cover medical costs. We want to ensure the best match for both you and the cat.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: Have questions about adoption, volunteering, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.

form.title: Send us a message
form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.

donate.title: Your support saves lives
donate.description: AFFA relies entirely on donations to provide medical care, food, and shelter for stray cats.

meal.title: Meal Maker
meal.desc: Provides a week of nutritious food for one cat.

health.title: Health Hero
health.desc: Covers essential vaccinations and a health checkup.

life.title: Life Saver
life.desc: Funds a full rescue operation and initial rehab.

monthly.title: Monthly Giving
monthly.description: Join our 'Purrfect Partners' program. Monthly donations provide the stable funding we need to plan long-term rescues.
monthly.updatesDesc: Get monthly stories of the cats you're helping.

wishlist.title: Amazon Wishlist
wishlist.desc: Buy food, litter, and toys directly for our shelter.

corporate.title: Corporate Matching
corporate.desc: Check if your employer matches charitable donations.

volunteer.title: Join our community
volunteer.description: Volunteers are the heart of AFFA. Whether you can spare a few hours a week or want to foster, we need your help.

shelter.title: Shelter Care
shelter.description: Help us with daily tasks at our main shelter. This includes feeding, cleaning, and most importantly, socializing with the cats.

foster.title: Foster Parenting
foster.description: Provide a temporary home for cats who need a quiet space to recover or kittens who need extra care before adoption.

impact.title: Make an Impact
impact.desc: Directly improve the lives of stray cats in your community.

skills.title: Learn New Skills
skills.desc: Gain experience in animal care and non-profit operations.

people.title: Meet People
people.desc: Join a supportive network of like-minded animal lovers.

s1.title: 1. What Are Cookies
s1.p1: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to the owners of the site.

s2.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
s2.p1: We use cookies for several reasons:
s2.l1: Essential Cookies: Necessary for the website to function properly.
s2.l2: Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.
s2.l3: Preference Cookies: Allow the website to remember choices you make.

s3.title: 3. Types of Cookies We Use
s3.td1: Temporary cookies that expire when you close your browser.
s3.td2: Remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them.

s4.title: 4. Managing Cookies
s4.p1: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can choose to block or delete cookies, but this may affect your experience on our website.

s5.title: 5. Updates to This Policy
s5.p1: We may update our Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: AFFA Association ('we,' 'our,' or 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
s2.p1: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you:
s2.l2: Sign up for our volunteer program
s2.l4: Contact us via our contact form
s2.p2: This information may include your name, email address, phone number, and mailing address.

s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
s3.p1: We use the information we collect to:
s3.l5: Send you updates about our shelter (with your consent)

s4.title: 4. Data Security
s4.p1: We implement reasonable security measures to protect the security of your personal information. However, please be aware that no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

s5.title: 5. Contact Us
s5.p1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@affa.org.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.p1: By accessing or using the AFFA website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

s2.title: 2. Use License
s2.p1: Permission is granted to temporarily view the materials on our website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title.

s3.title: 3. Adoption Process
s3.p1: Submitting an adoption application does not guarantee adoption. We reserve the right to refuse any adoption application at our sole discretion to ensure the best interest of our animals.

s4.title: 4. Donations
s4.p1: All donations made to AFFA are non-refundable and will be used to support our mission of cat rescue and welfare.

s5.title: 5. Disclaimer
s5.p1: The materials on our website are provided on an 'as is' basis. AFFA makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties.

s6.title: 6. Governing Law
s6.p1: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which our association is registered.
